_comment: Host registry. canonical_key is the directory name under host-notes/. primary_marker is the preferred name to use in prompts and logs. markers are case-insensitive word-boundary regexes used to detect host references in user prompts. forbidden:true blocks the loader, writer, and reflection prompt for that host. version bumps when the schema changes.

hosts.notes: Local workstation. 'localhost' is a marker but is also extremely noisy — keep load behavior idempotent per session.
Debian 13 LXC host. Sudo requires password — never assume passwordless.
